title: Revision
description: Revision tracking schema capturing the full lineage and change history of acquisition artifacts.

revision_record.description: The primary revision metadata for this artifact.

revision_lineage.description: Optional lineage connecting this revision to its predecessors.

RevisionRecord.title: RevisionRecord
RevisionRecord.description: Metadata about a single revision of an acquisition artifact.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact being revised.

revision_number.description: Monotonically increasing revision counter for the artifact.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this revision was created.

change_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what changed in this revision.

author.description: User, service, or automation that created this revision.

checksum.description: Hash of the artifact content at this revision (e.g. SHA-256).

metadata.description: Additional revision metadata (e.g. review status, approvals).

RevisionLineage.title: RevisionLineage
RevisionLineage.description: Chain of ancestor revisions connecting the current state back to the original artifact.

root_revision_id.description: The original revision from which this lineage descends.

ancestors.description: Ordered list of ancestor revisions from most recent to root.

depth.description: Number of steps from this revision back to the root.
